{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/208769699?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LonggTeng/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LonggTeng/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LonggTeng/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LonggTeng/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/LonggTeng", "id": 208769699, "login": "LonggTeng", "node_id": "U_kgDODHGSow", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LonggTeng/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LonggTeng/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LonggTeng/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LonggTeng/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LonggTeng/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/LonggTeng", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41390", "cvss": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-385", "name": "Covert Timing Channel"}], "description": "## Summary

Allow-always persistence did not unwrap `/usr/bin/script` and similar wrappers to the actual executed target before storing trust decisions.

## Impact

A user approval for one wrapped command could persist trust for a wrapper binary that later executed a different underlying program.

## Affected Component

`src/infra/dispatch-wrapper-resolution.ts, src/infra/exec-wrapper-resolution.ts`

## Fixed Versions

- Affected: `<= 2026.3.24`
- Patched: `>= 2026.3.28`
- Latest stable `2026.3.28` contains the fix.

## Fix

Fixed by commit `83da3cfe31` (`infra: unwrap script wrapper approval targets`).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00117, "percentile": 0.01942}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6pfc-6m7w-m8fx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-31T23:59:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6pfc-6m7w-m8fx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6pfc-6m7w-m8fx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41390"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-03-31T23:59:53Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-6pfc-6m7w-m8fx", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/83da3cfe31f016841e1deedda1a604696f4c488d", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.3.28", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6pfc-6m7w-m8fx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-6pfc-6m7w-m8fx", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw has a gateway exec allowlist allow-always bypass via unregistered /usr/bin/script wrapper", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-28T18:19:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6pfc-6m7w-m8fx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.28", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.24"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: OpenClaw has a gateway exec allowlist allow-always bypass via unregistered /usr/bin/script wrapper
